notes_for_main_thread: Chunk 04 (1157-1481s): Multiple text divergences between default (turbo) and loose (large-v3) transcripts. Key issues: (1) Pokemon name typos (Starmie→Star me, Sentret→Center it, Bayleef→bay leaf), (2) Splice hallucinations at clip boundaries (IDs 221-229 cluster), (3) High-confidence duplicates detected via MFCC. Recommend: re-transcribe borderline segments with large-v3 + word timestamps, verify Pokemon corrections manually, examine V1 clip boundaries near ~1175-1230s for possible splice artifacts.
